zh.lifeSummary: 當Vicomte de Turenne Boson de Turenne於大約1038年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延時，他的父親Guillaume de Comborn de Turenne Ier45歲，母親Mathilde de Vienne40歲。他和Gerberge de Terrasson至少有4個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1091年在巴勒斯坦耶路撒冷享年54歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Turenne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Normand, Donat, Emile, Francois, Philomene, Serge, Yves.
French: habitational name from Turenne, the name of several places in the southwestern part of France, e.g. in Corrèze, named with pre-Latin tur ‘height’.
History: Pierre Blanchard dit Turenne from Poitiers in Vienne, France, married Gertrude-Michelle Dupuis in Trois-Rivières, QC, in 1733.

nameMeanings.name: Boson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: of French (Huguenot) origin, a variant of   Basson  . This surname is very rare in Germany. Compare   Posson  .

variants.name: Bateson
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): patronymic from   Bate   or   Batt  .

en.lifeSummary: When Vicomte de Turenne Boson de Turenne was born about 1038, in Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Guillaume de Comborn de Turenne Ier, was 45 and his mother, Mathilde de Vienne, was 40. He had at least 4 sons and 3 daughters with Gerberge de Terrasson. He died in 1091, in Jerusalem, Palestine, at the age of 54.

fr.Mayenne, France: Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Vicomte de Turenne Boson de Turenne est né environ 1038, à Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Guillaume de Comborn de Turenne Ier, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Vienne, avait 40 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles avec Gerberge de Terrasson. Il est décédé en 1091, à Jerusalem, Palestine, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.Mayenne, France: Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Vicomte de Turenne Boson de Turenne um 1038 in Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume de Comborn de Turenne Ier 45 und seine Mutter Mathilde de Vienne 40. Er hatte mit Gerberge de Terrasson mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1091 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Jerusalem, Palästina.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Vicomte de Turenne Boson de Turenne è nato il circa 1038 nel Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume de Comborn de Turenne Ier, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde de Vienne, aveva 40 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie con Gerberge de Terrasson. Morì nel 1091, nel Jerusalem, Palestina, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Vicomte de Turenne Boson de Turenneが約1038年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメイエンで生まれた時，父Guillaume de Comborn de Turenne Ierは45歳，母Mathilde de Vienneは40歳であった。彼はGerberge de Terrassonとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1091年にパレスチナジャーウサレムで54歳で死去した。

ko.Mayenne, France: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니
ko.lifeSummary: Vicomte de Turenne Boson de Turenne(이)가 대략 1038년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume de Comborn de Turenne Ier(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde de Vienne(은)는 40세였다. 그는 Gerberge de Terrasson(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1091년 팔레스타인 제루사렘에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Vicomte de Turenne Boson de Turenne nasceu aproximadamente 1038, em Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Guillaume de Comborn de Turenne Ier, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Vienne, tinha 40 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas com Gerberge de Terrasson. Ele faleceu em 1091, em Jerusalem, Palestina, com 54 anos.

ru.Mayenne, France: меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Vicomte de Turenne Boson de Turenne родился около 1038 г. в местности меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume de Comborn de Turenne Ier было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Vienne, 40. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери от Gerberge de Terrasson. Он умер в 1091 г. в местности джирсеилем, Палестина в возрасте 54 лет.
